arts.ttl: When is Real Madrid - Espanyol? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Real Madrid has been bettering their form, winning their last two league games. They managed a 1-1 draw against Mallorca and a 0-0 draw against Atlético Madrid, but suffered a 1-0 defeat to Real Valladolid, though in their last game they were able to beat Alaves by 3-2.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s Thibaut Courtois names his greatest all-time save
arts.sum: Thibaut Courtois is no stranger to success. Being a Real Madrid player since 2018, he has won all there is to win in the Spanish capital, including three league titles…

arts.ttl: Who is Martin Baturina? The 'new Luka Modric' wanted by Man Utd and Real Madrid
arts.sum: Being a midfielder from Dinamo Zagreb, it would always be hard for a youngster to avoid comparisons to Luka Modric but the tag is well-suited to Croatian wonderkid Martin Baturina . Baturina initially came through the academy of Hajduk Split before eventually going on to join rivals Dinamo as a 14-year-old, which saw him feature through in Croatia’s youth teams from the under-15s and beyond.

arts.ttl: Inside Spain: Lamine Yamal wonders, Martin Zubimendi regrets and Kylian Mbappe does Cristiano Ronaldo – in every sense
arts.sum: Inside Spain is a weekly instalment brought to you by Football España, providing an insight into all of the major stories coming out of the rich and intense climes of La Liga and beyond.
